seo.title: Careers at BSW TECH | Embedded, AUTOSAR, IoT & Full-Stack Roles
seo.description: Join BSW TECH in Chișinău (EU presence: Romania, Estonia). Open roles: Senior Embedded, AUTOSAR Integration, IoT Solutions Developer, Full-Stack Developer. Embedded School, mentorship, modern tooling.
seo.keywords: embedded jobs Moldova, AUTOSAR jobs, IoT developer jobs, careers BSW TECH

hero.title: Build Your Future at
hero.subtitle: Join our team of engineers working on cutting-edge projects in Automotive and IoT. Grow through our Embedded School and real-world mentorship.

whyJoin.title: Why Join BSW TECH?
whyJoin.subtitle: We invest in our people and create an environment where engineers can thrive.

benefits.title: Continuous Learning
benefits.description: Access to our Embedded School and mentorship from senior engineers.

benefits.title: Career Growth
benefits.description: Clear career paths and opportunities to work on cutting-edge projects.

benefits.title: Collaborative Culture
benefits.description: Work with talented engineers in a supportive team environment.

benefits.title: Latest Technologies
benefits.description: Work with European clients using modern tools and methodologies.

benefits.title: Work-Life Balance
benefits.description: Flexible work arrangements and supportive management.

benefits.title: International Exposure
benefits.description: Collaborate with clients from Sweden, Germany, Denmark, and Estonia.

school.title: BSW TECH Embedded School
school.description: Our unique Embedded School program helps junior engineers grow into senior specialists through:
items: Hands-on training with real automotive projects
AUTOSAR and functional safety certification paths

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.subtitle: Explore opportunities to join our engineering team.

items.title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer
items.description: Develop firmware for automotive ECUs using C/C++ and AUTOSAR.

items.title: Senior Java Developer
items.description: Design and build scalable backend services and microservices using Java, Spring Boot, and cloud-native architectures.

items.title: Scala Developer
items.description: Develop high-performance, functional-style backend systems and data pipelines using Scala, Akka, and the JVM ecosystem.

items.title: Full-Stack Developer
items.description: Build mobile and web applications using React, Node.js, and modern frameworks.

items.title: Go Developer
items.description: Build high-performance backend services, APIs, and distributed systems using Go and cloud-native tooling.

items.title: .NET Developer with Angular
items.description: Develop full-stack enterprise applications using .NET Core backend services and Angular front-end interfaces.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Don't see a position that fits? Send us your CV and we'll keep you in mind for future opportunities.
